ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* URL of the county's official website */,
  "county_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the county election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  "precinct_area" REAL /* Area of the precinct in square miles */,
  "precinct_voter_registration" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "precinct_polling_place" TEXT /* Name and address of the polling place for the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  "office_term_length" INTEGER /* Length of the term for the office (in years) */,
  "office_election_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of elections for the office (e.g., every 2 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the district belongs to */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  "district_voter_registration" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Brief description or biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the candidate */,
  "candidate_funding_source" TEXT /* Source of campaign funding (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party (e.g., REP, DEM, LIB) */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the party */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "party_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  "party_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles for the party */,
  "party_platform" TEXT /* Key points of the party's platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary, runoff) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "election_registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "election_results_announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when results will be announced */,
  "election_administrator" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the election administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the result belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the result belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the result belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast for the candidate */,
  "election_day_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the candidate on election day */,
  "early_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the candidate during early voting */,
  "absentee_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the candidate through absentee voting */,
  "mail_in_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the candidate through mail-in voting */,
  "provisional_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the candidate through provisional ballots */,
  "total_voting_methods" INTEGER /* Total number of different voting methods used */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "straight_party_votes" (
  "spv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each straight-party vote */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the straight-party vote belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the straight-party vote belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the straight-party vote belongs to */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the straight-party vote belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of straight-party votes cast for the party */,
  "absentee_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the party through absentee voting */,
  "mail_in_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the party through mail-in voting */,
  "provisional_voting_votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast for the party through provisional ballots */,
  "total_voting_methods" INTEGER /* Total number of different voting methods used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_straight_party_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_straight_party_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_straight_party_votes_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_straight_party_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots_cast" (
  "bc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot cast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election the ballot cast belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the ballot cast belongs to */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct the ballot cast belongs to */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast in the precinct */,
  "absentee_voting_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of absentee ballots cast */,
  "mail_in_voting_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in ballots cast */,
  "provisional_voting_ballots" INTEGER /* Number of provisional ballots cast */,
  "total_voting_methods" INTEGER /* Total number of different voting methods used */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, observer) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role in a separate table */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the election data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the election data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role in a separate table */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
